title: Washington Times: 'Beware a nuclear North Korea aligned with China, Russia' — 북한 핵무기·미사일 고도화 + 중·러 동맹 위험 경고 분석
snippet: North Korea is building more nuclear weapons and more sophisticated ballistic missiles to target the region and the U.S. while ensuring close alignment with China and Russia. Kim's appearance with Xi and Putin at China's recent military parade shows he is firmly aligned with two other great powers. NK has 50-60 nuclear weapons with enough fissile material to increase to 100 within a few years.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 동일 URL 없음. 4월 22일자 신규 분석 기사로, 북한 핵무기 50-60개 보유·100개 증가 전망과 중·러 동맹 위험을 종합 경고하는 새로운 관점의 기사
